mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (username, name, password, phone, sex, id_number, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{username}, #{name}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{idNumber}, #{status}, NOW(),NOW(), #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update:
UPDATE employee SET
username = #{username},
name = #{name},
phone = #{phone},
sex = #{sex},
id_number = #{idNumber},
status = #{status},
password = #{password},
update_time = NOW(), update_user = #{updateUser} -- 这里记得跟上你的 WHERE 条件 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM employee
AND name LIKE '%${name}%'
